headline: Verizon Communications at $46 And AT&T at $23: Buy, Sell or Hold?
summary: At $46.95 for Verizon (NYSE:VZ) and $23.21 for AT&T (NYSE:T), both telecom giants screen as range-bound. VZ sits just below its $50.91 52-week high, while T actually trades closer to its $22.32 52-week low after a recent downgrade. Both companies are mid-execution on aggressive fiber rollouts. Verizon closed its Frontier deal in January 2026 and now ... Verizon Communications at $46 And AT&T at $23: Buy, Sell or Hold?
